About 
Many things can cause the lining of the brain and spinal cord to swell. 
Learn More 
Sept. 9, 2025 
Causes 
Viral Meningitis 
Many viruses can cause meningitis. How they spread and who is at risk varies by virus. 
Sept. 9, 2025 
Bacterial Meningitis 
Many bacteria can cause meningitis. How they spread and who is at risk varies by bacteria type. 
Sept. 9, 2025 
Fungal Meningitis 
Fungal meningitis is uncommon, difficult to diagnose, and treated with antifungal medicines.
